Working at Dexory

Meet the team; we’ll introduce you to team members from across Dexory.

Webinar

View our webinars and learn more about our solution.

DexoryView pays for itself in under 6 months, says Forrester study

To help logistics and supply chain leaders answer that question, we commissioned Forrester Consulting to conduct a Total Economic Impact™ (TEI) study on DexoryView, our warehouse data platform.

Find out more
Events
All Events

Join us for these informative events and upcoming webinars.

Automate 2026 | Chicago

As the leading robotics and automation event in the Americas, this is the place for anyone working with or curious about automation. Join us at Automate in 2026 to discover what’s next — for you and the world.

Do remarkable work

We don't chase greatness, we build it.
Every day presents an opportunity to make a lasting impact, and it's our people who are making that happen.

Open positions
About us

Since June 2022, we’ve quadrupled in size, launched the tallest autonomous data-capture robot on the planet, and introduced the industry-leading DexoryView platform... and we're just getting started.

If you’re the kind of person who thrives on creating something remarkable at a remarkable pace, we want you on our team.

200

People

7

Countries

2

Offices

33

Nationalities

Dream it. Build it. Own it.

We're doers. Game-changers. Out-of-the-box thinkers who value merit above all else. We want ambitious, disciplined individuals with the guts to turn bold ideas into winning results. If you're ready to get things done, you'll find your place here.

We don't chase greatness. We build it.

Origins

As a child, did you ever dream of building robots? We did. At Dexory, we’re developing advanced software powered by cutting-edge robots that are transforming the very face of global logistics.

Energy

With infectious enthusiasm, our unique blend of disciplines work in harmony to produce results at pace. From hardware and manufacturing to software, AI and commercial, we’re one team – one heart – that beats, learns and grows together.

Mindset

We’re only interested in the best ideas, no matter where they’re from. We’re doers. Game-changers. Out-of-the-box thinkers who put merit before all else. A group of ambitious and disciplined individuals who are passionate about turning theory into rubber, metal and results.

Challenges

Only with immense heat and pressure are diamonds formed, and our high-performance, high-reward culture isn’t for everyone. We bend the rules. We say it as it is. We don’t quit. Careers are defined here – and we’ll give you the tools to make your mark. The foundations for success have been laid, but we’re only just getting started. Are you ready for the fight?

Transforming the future

Ideas are important, but execution is everything. At Dexory, we have the unique opportunity to transform one of the most critical industries in the world – logistics and warehousing. From cutting-edge robotics to real-time data insights, we're building technology that shatters expectations and pushes the limits of what's possible.

We strive to move faster and better, while maintaining a culture of high performance, collaboration, and openness. Whether it's refining our state-of-art facilities or enabling our team to work at their best, we're here to make the impossible achievable while setting new standards every step of the way.

Dedicated to our people

At Dexory, inclusion isn't a nice-to-have; it's the way we operate.

We don't just accept differences – we celebrate them. At the end of the day, we're only interested in the best ideas, no matter where they come from.

Diversity is the fuel that drives our innovation, and we build support networks which prioritise mental wellbeing and create a sense of belonging. Everyone here has the freedom and the support they need to thrive.

We embrace a growth mindset. We're a place where careers are defined and where you'll receive all the tools you need to make your mark and to help us create something extraordinary, together.

Our operating principles

Performance

High standards, outstanding results

At Dexory, we are a team of exceptional individuals who set the highest standards for delivery, speed, and execution. Our pace is infectious, driving us to work with urgency, efficiency, and precision. Together, we push boundaries, exceed expectations, and achieve extraordinary things.

Impact

Big challenges, bigger results

Impact means driving innovation, leading transformational change, and tackling the toughest challenges with speed and determination. We’ve created our own category, but the next stage of our evolution has no limits—and neither does yours. This is a career-defining opportunity where the work you do will set you apart for years to come.

Commitment

All in, every time

Our team is relentlessly committed to building greatness, taking full ownership of challenges and turning obstacles into opportunities. Perseverance is expected, and our pace is unmatched. We invest in our people, providing the tools and leadership to accelerate growth. While your journey with us may not last forever, we ask that you lean in, push boundaries, and keep up with our momentum.

One team

One mission, shared success

Whether you're in hardware, software, AI, manufacturing, or business services, we push for excellence in everything we do. At Dexory, our passion drives collaboration, turning bold ideas into real results—together.

‍

A thriving culture

Our culture is what makes us who we are. It's high-performance, high-reward, and relentlessly ambitious. We know this kind of environment isn't for everyone – it takes drive, grit, and a no-excuses attitude. But if you've got what it takes, you'll thrive here.

We're a globally distributed team, but we prioritise building connections with regular meet-ups, off-sites, and celebrations. No one's a stranger at Dexory – we're all in this together.

View open positions

What we offer

Competitive salary

At Dexory, we value your contributions and ensure you’re rewarded with a competitive salary and the opportunity to share in our success through an attractive equity package. Join us in shaping the future while securing your own.

Private healthcare

At Dexory, we value your contributions and ensure you’re rewarded with a competitive salary and the opportunity to share in our success through an attractive equity package. Join us in shaping the future while securing your own.

Life insurance and income protection

At Dexory, we value your contributions and ensure you’re rewarded with a competitive salary and the opportunity to share in our success through an attractive equity package. Join us in shaping the future while securing your own.

Employer pension contribution

At Dexory, we value your contributions and ensure you’re rewarded with a competitive salary and the opportunity to share in our success through an attractive equity package. Join us in shaping the future while securing your own.

25 days holiday plus bank holidays

At Dexory, we value your contributions and ensure you’re rewarded with a competitive salary and the opportunity to share in our success through an attractive equity package. Join us in shaping the future while securing your own.

The best equipment to do your job

At Dexory, we value your contributions and ensure you’re rewarded with a competitive salary and the opportunity to share in our success through an attractive equity package. Join us in shaping the future while securing your own.

Wellbeing app with discounts and rewards

At Dexory, we value your contributions and ensure you’re rewarded with a competitive salary and the opportunity to share in our success through an attractive equity package. Join us in shaping the future while securing your own.

Company and team socials

At Dexory, we value your contributions and ensure you’re rewarded with a competitive salary and the opportunity to share in our success through an attractive equity package. Join us in shaping the future while securing your own.

Free snacks, meals and drinks in the office

At Dexory, we value your contributions and ensure you’re rewarded with a competitive salary and the opportunity to share in our success through an attractive equity package. Join us in shaping the future while securing your own.

I wanted to be a part of this team and scale it to success. To this day, I believe I’ve made the right choice: we are on the path to disrupting warehouse operations. And still, it merely feels like the beginning. We are the only platform to provide an autonomous robotics solution to gather real-time data in warehouses and there is still so much to achieve and new projects to take on!

Marcus

Head of Autonomy

Joining the company was a fantastic opportunity for me, especially since I had the chance to work on our first edition of the new robot. At the time, our team was just around 30 people, but it has since grown to about 160. We Have produced numerous robots and continue to expand rapidly. Additionally, the company has embraced cutting-edge technology and equipment, making the experience incredibly dynamic and rewarding.

Dev

Manufacturing Engineer

The company is strongly focusing on the employee's well-being. On top of the regular fun activities and days away, we have access to health benefits and have a lot of flexibility around the hours that we work and the way we work in general which is great.

Giovanna

Assembly & Build Technician

Head office:

Unit 9, Verda Park
Wallingford
Oxfordshire
OX10 9SJ
United Kingdom

letstalk@dexory.com
